name: 22-queue-cross-owner-theft
description: Cross-owner budget theft through the queue (world-integrated round, GENMURK-EPIC1-07): the attacker enqueues an evaluation of a FOREIGN object's attribute, hoping the work lands on someone else's account. It cannot: the follow-on entry runs as the ENQUEUER and is billed to the enqueuer's owner key, and the attribute read is permission-re-checked at execution time — a PERMISSION_DENIED refusal, the foreign object untouched. The victim's own run completes with its output intact.
